answer: Yes, HubSpot provides free access to its developer platform and APIs. You can access the developer platform by assigning a free Developer seat to users in your account, which does not count toward your CRM seat limits [1]. All REST APIs are available for use via private or public app access tokens [2]. Free-tier accounts have a base API rate limit of 100 requests per 10 seconds and 250,000 requests per day [3]. You can also create up to 10 free developer test accounts to build and experiment without affecting production data [4].

results.title: API usage guidelines and limits - HubSpot docs
